Setup hooks run after config in source order; wired params and error returns.
-- go.mod --
module app

go 1.26
-- main.go --
package main

import "os"

func main() { os.Exit(run()) }
-- setup/setup.go --
package setup

import "context"

//fabrik:hook setup
func Logging() {}

//fabrik:hook setup
func Tracing(ctx context.Context) error { return nil }
-- web/web.go --
package web

import "net/http"

type Greeter struct{}

//fabrik:provider
func NewGreeter() *Greeter { return &Greeter{} }

type Handlers struct {
	Greeter *Greeter
}

//fabrik:http GET /
func (h *Handlers) Index(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {}
-- want/main.gen.go --
// Code generated by fabrik. DO NOT EDIT.
// Regenerate with: fabrik wire

package main

import (
	"context"
	"fmt"
	"os"

	"github.com/gofabrik/fabrik/router"

	"app/setup"
	"app/web"
)

func run() int {
	ctx := context.Background()
	if err := func() error {
		// Setup: after config, before providers
		setup.Logging()

		if err := setup.Tracing(ctx); err != nil {
			return err
		}

		// Providers
		webGreeter := web.NewGreeter()
		webHandlers := &web.Handlers{
			Greeter: webGreeter,
		}

		r := router.New()

		// Register
		r.Method("GET", "/", webHandlers.Index)
		return nil
	}(); err != nil {
		fmt.Fprintln(os.Stderr, "app:", err)
		return 1
	}
	return 0
}
